name: Welcome to Hell | Hellaverse World RPG
description:
Storms Comin', are you ready to go to Hell?

Welcome to my next work in world simulation: The Hellaverse

This is a Work in Progress, and will be regularly updated with both the bot and its scripts. Thanks


Lore accurate, fully detailed and canon with the series for the best kind of role play; Full Creative Freedom and Choice. Welcome to Hell, Fuckers.

This bot features multiple and i mean MULTIPLE different introduction messages to fit your start in the world as well.

Just like my Beastars bot, this one includes added scripts, world building, canon character additions, full creative freedoms and full control over your fate in hell. Play an existing character, or play as your own original creation. This bot is also designed with "adaptive replies", letting you be as descriptive or simple as you wish in responses.

Disclaimer: This Bot starts with the beginning of Season 2 of Hazbin Hotel, and it is not canon with end of the season. This leaves room for no spoilers to those who haven't seen it, and ability to interact with characters who may or may not be accessible after the season 2 ending. Thanks-

Obvious Trigger Warning are included for this kind of world simulation: Don't say I didn't include this.

If you have interests in suggesting additions to be created for the bot publicly, or things I had missed, please let me know in the comment section. I will not be including original characters into the canon lore of the bot, do not ask. This includes non lore accurate information or facts as well.

Thanks, and Enjoy.
creator: TF2Driver
